backstory.original: Penelope 'Half-Pint' is a halfling who just wants to be everyone's best friend, even if they are evil, or a plant, or a rock. With friends that already include a treant named Neverember, and a clan of chwinga that have adopted her, Penelope is ready for anything! She has the heart of a true hero and will always stand by her friends, until she goes into shrub mode of course.
backstory.display: 佩内洛普“半品脱”是个半身人。她想成为所有人最好的朋友，即使他们是邪恶的，或是植物，或是石头。佩内洛普的朋友已经包括一个叫内威尔伦勃尔的树精，还有一个收养她的楚因加氏族。佩内洛普做好了一切准备！她有一颗真正的英雄之心，并将永远站在她朋友的身边，当然，是在她进入灌木模式之前。

description.original: Penelope jumps out and hits the closest enemy with her quarterstaff, dealing damage and knocking it back slightly.
description.display: 佩内洛普跳起用她的短杖攻击距离最近的敌人，造成伤害并将其稍微击退。

description.original: A fountain of churned earth and stone erupt under the nearest enemy, dealing area damage in a large radius and creating difficult terrain that lasts for 30 seconds.
description.display: 翻腾的泥土和石块从距离最近的敌人脚下喷发而出，在大范围内造成范围伤害并制造出持续 30 秒的困难地形。

longDescription.original: A fountain of churned earth and stone erupt under the nearest enemy, dealing area damage in a large radius and creating difficult terrain that slows enemies in it by 50% and lasts for 30 seconds.
longDescription.display: 翻腾的泥土和石块从距离最近的敌人脚下喷发而出，在大范围内造成范围伤害并制造出持续 30 秒的困难地形，该地形会使敌人减速 50%。

description.original: Penelope causes enemies she hits but doesn't kill to take additional damage for the next 30 seconds
description.display: 被佩内洛普攻击后仍然存活的敌人，接下来的 30 秒内会受到额外伤害。

description.original: Whenever the formation is under attack Penelope dons her Chwinga Mask and buffs the formation based on the Champions that are adjacent to her
description.display: 每当阵型受到攻击时，佩内洛普会戴上楚因加面具，根据与她相邻的勇士为阵型提供不同增益。

description.desc: Whenever Penelope attacks an enemy and doesn't kill it, for the next 30 seconds, all Champions deal $(amount)% additional damage against them.
佩内洛普攻击且未能击杀一名敌人时，在接下来的 30 秒内，所有勇士对该敌人的伤害额外提高 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: Penelope causes enemies she hits but doesn't kill to take additional damage from other Champions.
tipText.display: 其他勇士对被佩内洛普击中但没有死亡的敌人造成额外的伤害。

description.desc: Upon entering an area, Penelope summons 4 medium-sized, randomly positioned Insect Swarms on the enemy's side of the battlefield. Enemies who are in a Swarm are slowed by $(amount)% and are afflicted by the Have You Met My Friends debuff. The slow effect can stack multiplicatively if an enemy is inside multiple Swarms. Every second an enemy is in a swarm, its slowing effect is reduced by $(slow_reduction_per_second)%. When the slow effect reaches $(min_slow_amount)%, the swarm is dispersed and disappears.
进入一个区域后，佩内洛普在战场敌人侧的随机位置召集 4 个中型虫群。虫群中的敌人减速 $(amount)%，并被施加“你见过我的朋友们吗”减益。如果敌人位于多个虫群内，减速效果可以以乘算方式堆叠。敌人在虫群中每度过一秒钟，其减速效果降低 $(slow_reduction_per_second)%。当减速效果达到 $(min_slow_amount)%时，虫群飞散并消失。

description.pre: When any enemy enters one of Penelope's Insect Swarms, Penelope dons her chwinga mask, calling an elemental friend to her aid. It sits on her shoulder while her mask is on. All Champions adjacent to Penelope gain the following charm(s) based on their tags. Charms last until the party changes areas.

conditions.desc: ^^Healing Charm: Penelope heals affected Champions for $(amount___2) HP every second.^^Tools for the Job Charm: Penelope increases the damage of all Champions by $(not_buffed amount___3)% for each Champion affected by this charm. This effect stacks multiplicatively.

effect_keys.override_key_desc: Healing Charm - Penelope heals $target for $amount every second

effect_keys.total_title: Tools for the Job Damage Bonus
effect_keys.override_key_desc: Tools for the Job Charm - Penelope increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%

description.pre: 当任何敌人进入佩内洛普的虫群时，佩内洛普会戴上她的楚因加面具，召唤一名元素生物朋友前来帮忙。当她戴上面具时，元素会坐在她的肩膀上。所有与佩内洛普相邻的勇士根据其标签获得以下法术效果。符咒会一直持续到探险队改变区域。

conditions.desc: ^^治愈符咒：佩内洛普每秒为受影响的勇士治疗 $(amount___2) 点生命值。^^物尽其用符咒：每有一位受到此符咒影响的勇士，佩内洛普均使所有勇士的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount___3) %此效果以乘算方式堆叠。

effect_keys.override_key_desc: 治愈符咒——佩内洛普每秒为$target 回复 $amount 生命值
物尽其用符咒——佩内洛普使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%

tipText.original: When an enemy enters one of Penelope's Insect Swarms, she buffs the formation based on Champions around her.
tipText.display: 当敌人进入佩内洛普的疫病虫群时，她会根据周围的勇士增强阵型。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Have You Met My Friends by $(amount)% for each Good Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中的每位善良阵营勇士均使“你见过我的朋友们吗”的效果提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的善良勇士数量：$num_stacks___2

specializationDescription.original: Penelope meets the Good Champions in the formation, greatly buffing Have You Met My Friends for each one.
specializationDescription.display: 佩内洛普结识阵型中的善良勇士，使他们的“你见过我的朋友们吗”效果大幅强化。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Have You Met My Friends by $(amount)% for each Evil Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中的每位邪恶阵营勇士均使“你见过我的朋友们吗”的效果提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的邪恶勇士数量：$num_stacks___2

specializationDescription.original: Penelope meets the Evil Champions in the formation, moderately buffing Have You Met My Friends for each one.
specializationDescription.display: 佩内洛普结识阵型中的邪恶勇士，使他们的“你见过我的朋友们吗”效果中幅强化。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Have You Met My Friends by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中的每位勇士均使“你见过我的朋友们吗”的效果提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Penelope meets all the other Champions in the formation, slightly buffing Have You Met My Friends for each one.
specializationDescription.display: 佩内洛普结识阵型中的所有其他勇士，使他们的“你见过我的朋友们吗”效果小幅强化。

description.desc: Each time a Champion adjacent to Penelope attacks, add a stack of Story Time. The party's gold find is increased by $(not_buffed amount)% for each stack of Story Time, stacking additively. Story Time stacks are capped at $(max_stacks). Whenever a boss enemy enters an Insect Swarm, the number of Story Time stacks are increased by $(boss_percent)%.
每当与佩内洛普相邻的勇士攻击时，增加一层“故事时间”堆叠。每层“故事时间”堆叠均使探险队的金币寻获数量提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以加算方式堆叠。“故事时间”的堆叠上限为 $(max_stacks) 层。每当首领敌人进入虫群时，“故事时间”的堆叠层数增加 $(boss_percent)%。

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"buff_upgrade,100,14701,2","description":"Increases the damage of Penelope's Chwinga Mask Tools for the Job Charm by $(amount)%."}
{"effect_string":"buff_upgrade,70,14701,1","description":"Increases the healing of Penelope's Chwinga Mask Healing Charm by $(amount)%."}

description.desc: Each time one of Penelope's Insect Swarms is dispersed, the effect of Chwinga Mask is increased by $(not_buffed amount)%, stacking multiplicatively and resetting when you change areas.
每当佩内洛普的虫群消散时，楚因加面具的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠，并在改变区域时重置。

specializationDescription.original: Penelope summons fireflies that illuminate her foes.
specializationDescription.display: 佩内洛普召唤萤火虫照亮她的敌人。

description.desc: Each time one of Penelope's Insect Swarms is dispersed, another smaller swarm appears randomly (preferring to appear on an enemy if possible), damaging enemies in it for $(seconds_of_bud) seconds of BUD damage and slowing them using the same rules as the original Insect Plague. These smaller swarms do not spawn additional ones when they disperse.
每当佩内洛普的虫群消散时，随机出现一个小虫群（如果可能的话，偏向出现在敌人身上），对其中的敌人造成 $(seconds_of_bud) 秒的基础杀招伤害，并应用与原本的“疫病虫群”相同的规则使其减速。这些小虫群在消散时不会刷新额外的虫群。

specializationDescription.original: Penelope summons bees that are difficult to get rid of.
specializationDescription.display: 佩内洛普召唤难以摆脱的蜜蜂。

description.desc: Each time one of Penelope's Insect Swarms is dispersed, Penelope reduces the cooldown of all adjacent Champions ultimate abilities by $(amount)% of its remaining cooldown.
每当佩内洛普的虫群消散时，佩内洛普使所有相邻勇士的杀招技能冷却时间缩短，数值相当于其剩余冷却时间的 $(amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: Penelope summons ladybugs that are ultimately awesome.
specializationDescription.display: 佩内洛普召唤绝赞的瓢虫。

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"buff_upgrade,100,14701,2","description":"Increases the damage of Penelope's Chwinga Mask Tools for the Job Charm by $(amount)%."}
{"effect_string":"buff_upgrade,70,14701,1","description":"Increases the healing of Penelope's Chwinga Mask Healing Charm by $(amount)%."}

{"effect_string":"buff_upgrade,100,14701,2","description":"Increases the damage of Penelope's Chwinga Mask Tools for the Job Charm by $(amount)%."}

description.original: I'm small but I can help! Let's go!
description.display: 我虽然小，但也能帮忙！我们走！

description.original: We can do this! Together!
description.display: 我们可以做到的！一起来吧！

description.original: Won't you be my friend?
description.display: 愿意当我的朋友吗？

description.original: Do we NEED to spend that gold right now?
description.display: 我们必须立刻花掉那些金币吗？

description.original: Oh, look, a gold coin! OH! Another one! And another! And -
description.display: 快看，一枚金币！哇！又一枚！还有一枚！还有——

description.original: Who do we help next?
description.display: 接下来我们要帮谁？

description.original: Maybe we should clean up after ourselves.
description.display: 也许我们应该自己打扫一下。

description.original: I've got one of them in my pack. Look! It's a clock! I think.
description.display: 我背包里有一个了。看！是块表！我想是的。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Penelope's Chwinga Mask Tools for the Job Charm by $(amount)%.

description.original: I think I'm part chwinga now. COOL!
description.display: 我觉得我现在也是楚因加的一部分。酷！

effects.description: Increases the healing of Penelope's Chwinga Mask Healing Charm by $(amount)%.

description.original: No Tiamat! BAD! Put Avren down NOW!
description.display: 不，提亚马特！不乖！快把阿夫伦放下！

description.original: Can you BELIEVE that happened?
description.display: 你能相信发生了什么吗？

description.original: Who could have expected that?
description.display: 谁能料到呢？

description.original: Once in a lifetime for sure!
description.display: 绝对是千载难逢！

description.original: I cherish our time together!
description.display: 我珍惜我们在一起的时光！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Penelope's Friends Specialization abilities by $(amount)%.

description.original: Aw, I just love you all so much.
description.display: 噢，我太爱你们了。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Penelope's Friends Specialization abilities by $(amount)%.

description.original: LOOK HOW COLORFUL I AM!
description.display: 看看我多漂亮！

effects.description: Penelope also counts as an Aasimar

name.original: Herald of the World Tree Penelope

description.original: Can you see the Minotaur!?
description.display: 你能看见牛头人吗？

description.original: I don't mind walking to waterdeep, I have a fish friend there!
description.display: 我不介意走路去深水城。我有一位鱼朋友在那里！

description.original: It makes me taller.
description.display: 它能让我变得更高。

description.original: Shhh! Stay here and keep quiet till I talk us out of this!
description.display: 嘘！留在这儿别出声，我想办法说点什么让我们脱身！

description.original: Look what I drew!
description.display: 看看我画了什么！

description.original: I got to ride a unicorn with Orkira once. That was nice.
description.display: 我跟奥尔基拉一起骑过一次独角兽。那真是太棒了。

description.original: I love my friends.
description.display: 我爱我的朋友。

description.original: Friends last forever. So does stone.
description.display: 友谊永存，石头也一样。

description.original: It's time for adventure! IT'S TIME FOR ADVENTURE!
description.display: 是时候冒险了！是时候冒险了！

effects.description: Increases the healing of Penelope's Chwinga Mask Healing Charm by $(amount)%.

description.original: If I stand really still I'll become invisible, right?
description.display: 如果我站得直挺挺的，我就会隐形了，对吧？

effects.description: Increases the healing of Penelope's Chwinga Mask Healing Charm by $(amount)%.

description.original: I am as elusive as a golden beetle.
description.display: 我像黄金甲虫一样难以找到。

effects.description: Increases the healing of Penelope's Chwinga Mask Healing Charm by $(amount)%.

description.original: It glows in the dark!
description.display: 它在黑暗中会发光！

effects.description: Increases the healing of Penelope's Chwinga Mask Healing Charm by $(amount)%.

description.original: Taste THIS!
description.display: 试试这个吧！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Penelope's Chwinga Mask Tools for the Job Charm by $(amount)%.

description.original: Spurt! Grab a centipede and get over here!
description.display: 斯普特！抓一条蜈蚣过来！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Penelope's Chwinga Mask Tools for the Job Charm by $(amount)%.

description.original: This is the point when something bad is supposed to happen!
description.display: 这就是应该有坏事发生的时候！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Penelope's Chwinga Mask Tools for the Job Charm by $(amount)%.

name.display: 佩内洛普的豆子抛射器

description.original: Freely helped me grow Penelo-peas! They go squish.
description.display: 弗里帮我种了佩内洛豆！它们要压坏了。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Penelope's Chwinga Mask Tools for the Job Charm by $(amount)%.

description.original: Does this mean the end of our vacation?
description.display: 这是不是意味着我们的假期要结束了？

description.original: Do doooo do-do-do!
description.display: 嘟嘟，嘟，嘟，嘟！

name.display: 内威尔伦勃尔的勇敢橡子

description.original: It makes me braver.
description.display: 它让我变得更勇敢。

name.display: 内威尔伦勃尔的精致橡子

description.original: Neverember survived the fire. I'll bet he's fireproof.
description.display: 内威尔伦勃尔在那场大火中存活了下来。我敢打赌他不怕火。

description.original: LOOK! I'm a shrub!
description.display: 快看！我是灌木！

description.original: EEP! Shrub mode!
description.display: 哈！灌木模式！

description.original: Shhhh. I'm hiding.
description.display: 嘘，我在躲着呢。

description.original: SPURT! Don't eat them!
description.display: 斯普特！别吃那些东西！

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount%
Increases the damage of all Male Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Halfing Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a DEX score of 11 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions with a WIS score of 15 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Melee Champion in the formation

character_sheet_details.backstory: Penelope 'Half-Pint' is a halfling who just wants to be everyone's best friend, even if they are evil, or a plant, or a rock. With friends that already include a treant named Neverember, and a clan of chwinga that have adopted her, Penelope is ready for anything! She has the heart of a true hero and will always stand by her friends, until she goes into shrub mode of course.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Penelope is a support Champion who gets her friends to kill things for her and summons a Chwinga companion whenever the formation is under attack.

event_upgrades.name: Have You Met My Friends
event_upgrades.description: Penelope causes enemies she hits but doesn't kill to take additional damage for the next 30 seconds

event_upgrades.name: Chwinga Mask
event_upgrades.description: Whenever the formation is under attack Penelope dons her Chwinga Mask and buffs the formation based on the Champions that are adjacent to her

character_sheet_details.backstory: 佩内洛普“半品脱”是个半身人。她想成为所有人最好的朋友，即使他们是邪恶的，或是植物，或是石头。佩内洛普的朋友已经包括一个叫内威尔伦勃尔的树精，还有一个收养她的楚因加氏族。佩内洛普做好了一切准备！她有一颗真正的英雄之心，并将永远站在她朋友的身边，当然，是在她进入灌木模式之前。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 佩内洛普是一名支援型勇士，她会让她的朋友们帮忙击杀敌人。在阵型受到攻击时，她会召唤一个楚因加伙伴。

event_upgrades.name: 你见过我的朋友们吗
event_upgrades.description: 被佩内洛普攻击后仍然存活的敌人，接下来的 30 秒内会受到额外伤害。

event_upgrades.name: 楚因加面具
event_upgrades.description: 每当阵型受到攻击时，佩内洛普会戴上楚因加面具，根据与她相邻的勇士为阵型提供不同增益。

original.name: Go Away

display.name: 走开

display.tip_text: 其他勇士对被佩内洛普击中但没有死亡的敌人造成额外的伤害。

display.name: 楚因加面具
display.tip_text: 当敌人进入佩内洛普的疫病虫群时，她会根据周围的勇士增强阵型。

original.name: Keep Your Friends Close
original.specialization_description: Penelope meets the Good Champions in the formation, greatly buffing Have You Met My Friends for each one.

display.name: 靠近你的朋友
display.specialization_description: 佩内洛普结识阵型中的善良勇士，使他们的“你见过我的朋友们吗”效果大幅强化。

original.name: Keep Your Future Friends Closer
original.specialization_description: Penelope meets the Evil Champions in the formation, moderately buffing Have You Met My Friends for each one.

display.name: 更加靠近未来的朋友
display.specialization_description: 佩内洛普结识阵型中的邪恶勇士，使他们的“你见过我的朋友们吗”效果中幅强化。

original.name: Everybody Gets To Be Friends
original.specialization_description: Penelope meets all the other Champions in the formation, slightly buffing Have You Met My Friends for each one.

display.name: 所有人都能成为朋友
display.specialization_description: 佩内洛普结识阵型中的所有其他勇士，使他们的“你见过我的朋友们吗”效果小幅强化。

original.name: Fury of the Fireflies
original.specialization_description: Penelope summons fireflies that illuminate her foes.

display.name: 萤火虫之怒
display.specialization_description: 佩内洛普召唤萤火虫照亮她的敌人。

original.name: Splitting The Hive
original.specialization_description: Penelope summons bees that are difficult to get rid of.

display.name: 分裂蜂巢
display.specialization_description: 佩内洛普召唤难以摆脱的蜜蜂。

original.name: Dance of the Ladybugs
original.specialization_description: Penelope summons ladybugs that are ultimately awesome.

display.name: 瓢虫之舞
display.specialization_description: 佩内洛普召唤绝赞的瓢虫。

original.name: Selflessness
original.description: I'm small but I can help! Let's go!

display.name: 无私
display.description: 我虽然小，但也能帮忙！我们走！

original.name: Inspiring Leader
original.description: We can do this! Together!

display.name: 鼓舞人心的首领
display.description: 我们可以做到的！一起来吧！

original.name: Alyndra's Intelligence
original.description: Who do we help next?

display.name: 艾琳朵拉的智力
display.description: 接下来我们要帮谁？

original.name: Orkira's Understanding
original.description: Maybe we should clean up after ourselves.

display.name: 奥尔基拉的谅解
display.description: 也许我们应该自己打扫一下。

original.name: Trust of the Clan
original.description: I think I'm part chwinga now. COOL!

effects.description: Increases the healing of Penelope's Chwinga Mask Healing Charm by $(amount)%.

display.name: 部落的信任
display.description: 我觉得我现在也是楚因加的一部分。酷！

effects.description: 使佩内洛普的楚因加面具“治愈”符咒的治疗效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Tools of the Clan
original.description: I've got one of them in my pack. Look! It's a clock! I think.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Penelope's Chwinga Mask Tools for the Job Charm by $(amount)%.

display.name: 部落的工具
display.description: 我背包里有一个了。看！是块表！我想是的。

effects.description: 使佩内洛普的楚因加面具“物尽其用”符咒的效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Friendly Tales
original.description: No Tiamat! BAD! Put Avren down NOW!

display.name: 友好的故事
display.description: 不，提亚马特！不乖！快把阿夫伦放下！

original.name: Prodigal Leader
original.description: Won't you be my friend?

display.name: 浪荡首领
display.description: 愿意当我的朋友吗？

original.name: Aasimar Glitch
original.description: LOOK HOW COLORFUL I AM!

effects.description: Penelope also counts as an Aasimar

display.name: 神裔变异
display.description: 看看我多漂亮！

effects.description: 佩内洛普也算作神裔

original.name: Frugal
original.description: Do we NEED to spend that gold right now?

display.name: 节俭
display.description: 我们必须立刻花掉那些金币吗？

original.name: Lucky
original.description: Oh, look, a gold coin! OH! Another one! And another! And -

display.name: 幸运
display.description: 快看，一枚金币！哇！又一枚！还有一枚！还有——

original.name: So There I Was...
original.description: Can you BELIEVE that happened?

display.name: 想当年……
display.description: 你能相信发生了什么吗？

original.name: Then Out of Nowhere...
original.description: Who could have expected that?

display.name: 忽然之间……
display.description: 谁能料到呢？

original.name: After You Left...
original.description: Once in a lifetime for sure!

display.name: 你离开后……
display.description: 绝对是千载难逢！

original.name: Growing Friendships
original.description: I cherish our time together!

effects.description: Increases the effect of Penelope's Friends Specialization abilities by $(amount)%.

display.name: 增长的友情
display.description: 我珍惜我们在一起的时光！

effects.description: 使佩内洛普的“朋友”专精技能效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Friends Forever
original.description: Aw, I just love you all so much.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Penelope's Friends Specialization abilities by $(amount)%.

display.name: 永远的朋友
display.description: 噢，我太爱你们了。

effects.description: 使佩内洛普的“朋友”专精技能效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Herald of the World Tree Penelope
Gnarled Staff
original.description: Can you see the Minotaur!?

display.name: 粗糙的手杖
display.description: 你能看见牛头人吗？

original.name: Traveling Staff
original.description: I don't mind walking to waterdeep, I have a fish friend there!

display.name: 旅行手杖
display.description: 我不介意走路去深水城。我有一位鱼朋友在那里！

original.name: Staff of the Woodlands
original.description: It makes me taller.

display.name: 林地之杖
display.description: 它能让我变得更高。

original.name: Cloud Reacher
original.description: Shhh! Stay here and keep quiet till I talk us out of this!

display.name: 直插云霄
display.description: 嘘！留在这儿别出声，我想办法说点什么让我们脱身！

original.name: Berry Drawing
original.description: Look what I drew!

display.name: 浆果画
display.description: 看看我画了什么！

original.name: Friends
original.description: I got to ride a unicorn with Orkira once. That was nice.

display.name: 朋友
display.description: 我跟奥尔基拉一起骑过一次独角兽。那真是太棒了。

original.name: Best Friends
original.description: I love my friends.

display.name: 好朋友
display.description: 我爱我的朋友。

original.name: The Neverending Story
original.description: Friends last forever. So does stone.

display.name: 说不完的故事
display.description: 友谊永存，石头也一样。

original.name: Painted Rock
original.description: It's time for adventure! IT'S TIME FOR ADVENTURE!

effects.description: Increases the healing of Penelope's Chwinga Mask Healing Charm by $(amount)%.

display.name: 刷了油漆的石头
display.description: 是时候冒险了！是时候冒险了！

effects.description: 使佩内洛普的楚因加面具“治愈”符咒的治疗效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Chipped Mask
original.description: If I stand really still I'll become invisible, right?

effects.description: Increases the healing of Penelope's Chwinga Mask Healing Charm by $(amount)%.

display.name: 有缺损的面具
display.description: 如果我站得直挺挺的，我就会隐形了，对吧？

effects.description: 使佩内洛普的楚因加面具“治愈”符咒的治疗效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Magical Chwinga Mask
original.description: I am as elusive as a golden beetle.

effects.description: Increases the healing of Penelope's Chwinga Mask Healing Charm by $(amount)%.

display.name: 魔法楚因加面具
display.description: 我像黄金甲虫一样难以找到。

effects.description: 使佩内洛普的楚因加面具“治愈”符咒的治疗效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Mask of the Perian Clan
original.description: It glows in the dark!

effects.description: Increases the healing of Penelope's Chwinga Mask Healing Charm by $(amount)%.

display.name: 佩里安部落面具
display.description: 它在黑暗中会发光！

effects.description: 使佩内洛普的楚因加面具“治愈”符咒的治疗效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Berry Blaster
original.description: Taste THIS!

effects.description: Increases the effect of Penelope's Chwinga Mask Tools for the Job Charm by $(amount)%.

display.name: 浆果捣碎器
display.description: 试试这个吧！

effects.description: 使佩内洛普的楚因加面具“物尽其用”符咒的效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Cockroach Catapult
original.description: Spurt! Grab a centipede and get over here!

effects.description: Increases the effect of Penelope's Chwinga Mask Tools for the Job Charm by $(amount)%.

display.name: 蟑螂弹弓
display.description: 斯普特！抓一条蜈蚣过来！

effects.description: 使佩内洛普的楚因加面具“物尽其用”符咒的效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Stone Slinger
original.description: This is the point when something bad is supposed to happen!

effects.description: Increases the effect of Penelope's Chwinga Mask Tools for the Job Charm by $(amount)%.

display.name: 投石者
display.description: 这就是应该有坏事发生的时候！

effects.description: 使佩内洛普的楚因加面具“物尽其用”符咒的效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Penelope's Pea Pitcher
original.description: Freely helped me grow Penelo-peas! They go squish.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Penelope's Chwinga Mask Tools for the Job Charm by $(amount)%.

display.name: 佩内洛普的豆子抛射器
display.description: 弗里帮我种了佩内洛豆！它们要压坏了。

effects.description: 使佩内洛普的楚因加面具“物尽其用”符咒的效果提高 $(amount)%。

original.name: Acorn of Courage
original.description: Does this mean the end of our vacation?

display.name: 勇气橡子
display.description: 这是不是意味着我们的假期要结束了？

original.name: Acorn-Acorn
original.description: Do doooo do-do-do!

display.name: 橡子橡子
display.description: 嘟嘟，嘟，嘟，嘟！

original.name: Neverember's Acorn of Bravery
original.description: It makes me braver.

display.name: 内威尔伦勃尔的勇敢橡子
display.description: 它让我变得更勇敢。

original.name: Neverember's Fancy Acorn
original.description: Neverember survived the fire. I'll bet he's fireproof.

display.name: 内威尔伦勃尔的精致橡子
display.description: 内威尔伦勃尔在那场大火中存活了下来。我敢打赌他不怕火。

original.name: Mossy Growth
original.description: LOOK! I'm a shrub!

display.name: 长满苔藓的植物
display.description: 快看！我是灌木！

original.name: Shrub Cloak
original.description: EEP! Shrub mode!

display.name: 灌木斗篷
display.description: 哈！灌木模式！

original.name: Cloak of the Forest Floor
original.description: Shhhh. I'm hiding.

display.name: 森林地面斗篷
display.description: 嘘，我在躲着呢。

original.name: Penelope's Bug Cloak
original.description: SPURT! Don't eat them!

display.name: 佩内洛普长虫的斗篷
display.description: 斯普特！别吃那些东西！

使所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%

使所有男性勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%

使所有半身人勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%

使所有感知大于等于 15 的勇士伤害提高 $(amount)%
